name: 脱ぐ
explanation: A JLPT N5 godan verb, transitive verb meaning "to take off".

example.japanese: 家に入る時は、靴を脱ぐよ。
example.english: I take off my shoes when I go in my house.

name: 着る
explanation: A JLPT N5 Ichidan verb, transitive verb meaning "to wear".

example.english: I don't have a thing to wear.

name: 消える
explanation: A JLPT N5 Ichidan verb, intransitive verb meaning "to disappear".

example.japanese: 雪はすぐに消えるだろう。

name: 掛ける
explanation: A JLPT N5 Ichidan verb, transitive verb meaning "to hang up".

example.english: Four multiplied by two is eight.

name: 忘れる
explanation: A JLPT N5 Ichidan verb, transitive verb meaning "to forget".

name: 為る
explanation: A JLPT N5 suru verb - included meaning "to do".

example.japanese: 今日、東京はとても寒く為るでしょう。
example.english: Today, Tokyo will get very cold.

name: 泳ぐ
explanation: A JLPT N5 godan verb, intransitive verb meaning "to swim".

explanation: A JLPT N5 godan verb, transitive verb meaning "to buy".
